title: 3 Clean Water Stocks to Diversify Your Green Portfolio
text: Wind and solar will continue to get the lion's share of the headlines as it relates to the world's clean energy transition. However, it may also be time for investors to consider investing in clean water stocks as part of a balanced clean energy portfolio.

title: Indiana's Silver Creek Water Corporation Takes Proactive Approach to Operations Using Xylem Technology
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Sensusnews--Each year, billions of gallons of water are needlessly lost, wasting resources and money. Southern Indiana's Silver Creek Water Corporation uses smart water technology to avoid this problem and proactively prevent water loss. The water corporation manages millions of gallons of water over hilly terrain for a population of 20,000 in Sellersburg. There is little room for error. That is why they continually strive for improvement by upgrading their distribution system.
